failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS failed (403: Write access to repository not granted). GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT has repo metadata permissions (admin/push/pull) but the 'contents' API scope is not granted — fine-grained PAT missing contents:read permission. notes: RECURRING (day 26): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 26 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-06-14).
